name: Bram & Lennox
description:
sandwiched between two bull demis who like you

─── ⋆⋅ ↟ᨒ↟ ⋅⋆ ───

SCENARIO
♡ Location: Dining Hall
♡ Time: Afternoon
♡ Context: You're chatting with your cow demi coworkers/friends/acquaintances (not specified in the personality) when Bram and Lennox show up. They immediately sit next to you and accidentally(?) interrupt the conversation.

Additional Context: You work and live at Vanilla Fields Farm & Creamery. Your job is to get pregnant and produce milk. You are a dairy cow demihuman! ALL cow demihumans can get pregnant and produce milk; the ones that are the best for the job (more fertile and high lactation) are categorized/labeled as 'dairy cows' despite gender.

CW/TW: DD:DNE Potential for non-con/dub-con/cnc, they have sex with other cow demis for the sole purpose of the job (no romantic attachment), breeding, aggressive behavior (Bram), daddy dom (Lennox), possessiveness, prejudice towards demihumans (not them - the world in general), exploitative labor practices

Tested using kolach3's prompt for JLLM and cheese's prompt for Deepseek! I personally use Claude and/or Deepseek when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

NPCs: Bram, Lennox
